title: PhysioMeter Measurement Groups
description: Links measurements to their calculations, interpretations, and display order.

key.description: Internal state key matching a measurement config key.

name.description: Display name shown in navigation and UI.

patient_level.description: If true, this is a patient attribute shown read-only in summary (not in measurement selection).

calculations.description: List of calculation keys to display in this group's summary.

interpretations.description: List of interpretation keys to display in this group's summary.
